name: coGetLastError
title: coGetLastError
description: Error Handling with CANopen Node Layer | See Also
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
dword coGetLastError( char buffer[], dword bufferSize );
The function returns the error code and error text of the last function call. Note If after a failed call a function is called successfully, then the last error is deleted.
Note If after a failed call a function is called successfully, then the last error is deleted.
Note If after a failed call a function is called successfully, then the last error is deleted.
buffer Buffer for the error text
bufferSize Size of the buffer in bytes

Example dword errCode[1];char errText[100];coODCreateFloat( 0x2000, 0x0, 0x1, 1, 2.5894, errCode );if ( coGetLastError(errText, elcount(errText)) != 0){ write( "Error %d occurred, ErrorText = %s", errCode[0], errText );}
